title: Build Resource Database
excerpt: I work for a college and we are trying to match faculty with an office space based on available office spaces on their campus.  I have an Available Room Directory board with all the room numbers separated by campus, wher…

posts.author: kivey_105 (Kim)
posts.cookedHtml:
I work for a college and we are trying to match faculty with an office space based on available office spaces on their campus. I have an Available Room Directory board with all the room numbers separated by campus, where each campus is a group. I have another board with the faculty members and all the information we need to track about them, including what room they’re in. Those 2 boards are connected.

When I have assigned a room, the room is automatically marked as Assigned on the directory board. When I enter a new faculty member and go to the Assigned Room column, I would like that list to only show rooms with status Available on the Directory board. On the screenshot, I have already assigned C270 but if I try to assign a room to the next faculty member, C270 is still on the list. I would like it to not show up. Any ideas?

Screenshot 2025-08-19 at 3.27.23 PM3250×1506 313 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
On the ‘room directory’ board, create a group called ‘Assigned (or something)’ and then move the rooms to that group when the status changes. Then when you are searching for a room, it will show the group name so you’ll be able to see if it’s assigned or not.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

image512×800 29.2 KB

posts.author: kivey_105 (Kim)
posts.cookedHtml: Oh my gosh! That was so simple! I was too far in the weeds to see it. Thank you!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Glad it helped!

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Clover_Gal ‘s solution is perfect as always.

As an added level, you can create an additional automation that when room becomes available it moves back to the Available Room group.

posts.author: kivey_105 (Kim)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, David! I’ve done that and it works perfectly!
